title: selaginella illecebrosa
intro: Selaginella illecebrosa, also known as Spikes Moss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Selaginella illecebrosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
